title: Larry Johnson: U.S. Attack on Kharg Island Will Destroy the Gulf States
summary:
Larry Johnson is a former intelligence analyst at the CIA who also worked at the US State Department's Office of Counterterrorism. Johnson discusses why a U.S. attack on Iran's energy facilities on Kharg Island will predictably result in Iran attacking all energy facilities in the Gulf States.

Read Larry Johnson's Sonar21: https://sonar21.com/

Follow Prof. Glenn Diesen: 
Substack: https://glenndiesen.substack.com/ 
X/Twitter: https://x.com/Glenn_Diesen
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/glenndiesen 

Support the research by Prof. Glenn Diesen: 
PayPal: https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/glenndiesen
Buy me a Coffee: buymeacoffee.com/gdieseng
Go Fund Me: https://gofund.me/09ea012f

Books by Prof. Glenn Diesen: 
https://www.amazon.com/stores/author/B09FPQ4MDL
